ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chambers" (
  "chamber_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chamber */,
  "chamber_name" TEXT /* Name of the chamber (e.g., House, Senate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chamber_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "member_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the member */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party the member belongs to */,
  "state_abbrev" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state the member represents */,
  "district" TEXT /* District the member represents */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the member */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the member */,
  "chamber_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the chamber the member serves in */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the member */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the member */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the member */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the member's official photo */,
  "term_start_date" TEXT /* Date the member's term started */,
  "term_end_date" TEXT /* Date the member's term ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_members_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_members_chamber_id FOREIGN KEY ("chamber_id") REFERENCES chambers ("chamber_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_members_state_abbrev FOREIGN KEY ("state_abbrev") REFERENCES states ("state_abbrev")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "party_abbrev" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_abbrev" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the district belongs to */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "member_id" TEXT /* Reference to the member who won the election */,
  "chamber_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the chamber the election was held for */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party the member belongs to */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date the election was held */,
  "winner_party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party of the winner */,
  "term_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the term for which the member was elected */,
  "term_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the term for which the member was elected */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Percentage of voter turnout in the election */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast */,
  "winning_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes the winner received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_chamber_id FOREIGN KEY ("chamber_id") REFERENCES chambers ("chamber_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_winner_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fec_candidates" (
  "fec_cand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FEC candidate */,
  "member_id" TEXT /* Reference to the member the FEC ID belongs to */,
  "fec_cand_name" TEXT /* Name of the FEC candidate */,
  "fec_committee_id" TEXT /* FEC committee ID */,
  "fec_filing_date" TEXT /* Date the candidate filed with the FEC */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fec_cand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fec_candidates_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "member_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "member_id" TEXT /* Reference to the member the history belongs to */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "changed_field" TEXT /* Field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the changed field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed field */,
  "changed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_history_changed_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_history_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Name of the chamber (e.g., House, Senate)
